pageContext.name: Rakan
pageContext.description: From the competitive online multiplayer game League of Legends comes the champion Rakan, known as 'the Charmer.' Rakan fights alongside his partner Xayah to protect their tribe, and restore their former glory. Rakan is known for his ability as the greatest battle-dancer in the tribe's history, and this figure displays that, with Rakan striking a pose reminiscent of one of his infamous grand entrances.  The Rakan PVC Figure stands approximately 11.42 inches tall on an appropriately swirling magical base that emulates his spell effects from the game!  Add to your League of Legends collection today!
